headline: Has Teradyne (TER) Run Too Far After Its 70.6% Year To Date Surge?
summary: How Teradyne's Recent Run Sets Up a Valuation Question Teradyne's share price has moved sharply in recent periods, and if you are wondering whether the current level still makes sense, the numbers give you plenty to think about. Over shorter horizons the stock has recorded returns of 3.1% over 7 days and 10.5% over 30 days, while the year to date return stands at 70.6%. Over longer periods, the 1 year, 3 year and 5 year returns are 362.5%, 293.1% and 208.1% respectively. These price moves...

headline: How Teradyne’s AI-Driven Record Q1 And Guidance At Teradyne (TER) Has Changed Its Investment Story
summary: Teradyne, Inc. recently reported first-quarter 2026 results showing sales of US$1,282.49 million and net income of US$398.91 million, and issued second-quarter revenue guidance of US$1,150 million to US$1,250 million with GAAP diluted EPS of US$1.83 to US$2.12. With AI-related applications now contributing nearly 70% of revenue and a quarterly dividend of US$0.13 per share declared, Teradyne’s earnings profile is increasingly tied to AI infrastructure spending while still returning cash to...
